title: Hegseth 'Negotiate with Bombs' — Pentagon escalation rhetoric
snippet: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth declared: 'If we need to negotiate with bombs, we'll negotiate with bombs. And we're very good at it.' This rhetoric marks the Pentagon's sharpest escalation language since the war began, signaling a decisive shift from diplomatic to military track.
tag_reason: 헤그세스 국방장관의 전쟁 이후 가장 강경한 발언 — 외교 트랙에서 군사 트랙으로의 전환 공식화
